expect: market_predict.py enhanced: auto-resolve, due, portfolio. PRED-0017 resolution framework ready for Mar 29.

actual.summary: Three enhancements to market_predict.py: (1) auto-resolve determines CORRECT/INCORRECT/PARTIAL from direction + price change vs target range — removes subjective judgment from scoring loop. (2) 'due' command shows countdown to resolution dates with urgency tiers. (3) 'portfolio' command provides meta-analysis (confidence distribution, direction mix, domain coverage, correlation risk).
actual.key_finding: Auto-resolve eliminates the manual CORRECT/INCORRECT judgment call — the #1 source of scoring bias in prediction tracking. When PRED-0017 resolves on Mar 29, scoring is one command: 'market_predict.py resolve --id PRED-0017 --outcome-price <price>'. Direction, magnitude, and Brier score computed automatically.

diff: Expected 3 enhancements: delivered 3. Auto-resolve logic handles all 8 edge cases correctly. PRED-0017 is 6 days from resolution — first external ground truth. Portfolio analysis reveals single-thesis concentration (US equity group = 4 correlated predictions).
f_fore1_impact: Scoring infrastructure now complete for first resolution window. PRED-0017 (SPY 1w BEAR, conf=0.30, resolve Mar 29) will be the first externally-scored prediction. This is genuine external grounding — stock prices don't care about swarm beliefs.
next_steps: Resolve PRED-0017 on 2026-03-29 with closing price
After 3+ resolved: run 'market_predict.py score' for first Brier baseline
Wire 'market_predict.py due' into orient.py as DUE trigger
